children.name: Here is what’s happening with your job search applications from July 19 - July 25.
children.characters: Here is job applications status from July 19 - July 25.

children.name: You can request a follow-up 7 days after applying for a job if the application status is in review. Only one follow-up is allowed per job.
children.characters: You can request a follow-up 7 days after applying for a job if the application status is in review. Only one follow-up is allowed per job.
